creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Last commit was ports r333122 (a year ago). Patches (e.g. bug 181419, bug 185740) seem to land only per timeout. And having such bugs "Assigned To" clsung@ is wrong because he's not responsible for any regressions that may arise.

http://freshbsd.org/search?committer=clsung&project=freebsd-ports
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/buglist.cgi?quicksearch=assignee%3Aclsung status%3A"issue resolved"

For one, bug 187562 needs attention as redundancy in effort increases while no one to mediate.
